title: proc_clean doesn't handle State::Sa, will remove switches that use them

features.name: switch case with don't-care bits using Sa
features.description: Code should include a switch statement with case patterns containing don't-care bits (Sa/high-impedance state) in RTLIL
features.snippet:
switch 2'10
  case 2'-1
    assign \w 1'0
  case 2'1-
    assign \w 1'1
end

features.name: case pattern matching with mismatched fully-const switch operand
features.description: Code should include a switch with a fully-const operand that fails to match case operands containing don't-care bits
